title: Easy Living
description: A calming, ambient Modpack that contains some of my favorite mods. Perfect for a chill playthrough.
body:
![Full Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e40afd4fd9c932e429da4fbe35cfaf9f9e0e2bdf.png)
![Space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2a78cc5b6b2ac3064e06cccb834ef60be9865d.png)
Have you ever wanted to play minecraft but youre **tired of all the difficult**, complex and **stressful modpacks? **Then this pack is for you! Unlike others easy living wont judge if you just want to have fun without monsters! **experience an easy calm life in Easy Living!**

![Space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2a78cc5b6b2ac3064e06cccb834ef60be9865d.png)

## Modpack Features
- 🥞 **Food and Farming** - This modpack add a **TON** of farming and food options.
- 🪑 **Furniture** - There is plenty of nice decor options in this pack.
- 💿 **Discord Support** - Discord will tell all your friends what youre doing!
- 💰 **Custom Loot** - Using LootR the loot tables are changed and renewable for each player!
- 🍂 **Ambience** - This pack has plenty of visual and audio based ambient mods for Immersion.
- 🏰 **Structures** - There are plenty of new and redone old structures to explore!.
- 💘 **Family** - This pack has overhauled villagers allowing for family and love to be formed.
- 🦑 **Gipples** - Gipples.... they are here.
![Space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2a78cc5b6b2ac3064e06cccb834ef60be9865d.png)

## FAQ
- **Q:** Is this pack Multiplayer? **A:** This pack is made for singleplayer but works well multiplayer if you so choose to play it that way.

**Thats all it really adds,** its a **simple small pack** but i hope you enjoy.

Have a wonderful day :)
